summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Trading Bot Builder platform P0-P3 features. Backend 100% (18/18 tests passed). Frontend fully functional after fixing SelectItem bug in News & Sentiment page.

working_endpoints: Auth endpoints - login, signup, me (all working)
Backtest engine - /api/backtest/run now working with institutional metrics
Backtest indicators - /api/backtest/indicators returns all Zerodha Kite indicators
Deployments - create, list, get, pause, start, stop (all working)
Sentiment analysis - /api/news/analyze (working with keyword fallback - LLM budget exceeded)

issues: Minor React warning: Cannot update component while rendering - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

fixed_bugs.issue: SelectItem component had empty string value causing React runtime error
fixed_bugs.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' with value transformation

critical_code_review_comments: News data is MOCKED - using static headlines for demonstration
AI Sentiment analysis falls back to keyword-based analysis (LLM budget exceeded per main agent note)
All backtest institutional metrics now displaying correctly: Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, Win Rate, CAGR

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages loading, all navigation working, all key features functional)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0-P3 features are working. Backtest engine now returns proper institutional metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, Win Rate, Profit Factor etc). News & Sentiment page fixed - was a Radix UI SelectItem empty value bug. News data is MOCKED, AI Sentiment uses keyword fallback due to LLM budget.

bot_builder.visual_builder: Working - entry/exit conditions with AND/OR logic
bot_builder.risk_management: Working - stop loss, take profit, position sizing sliders

navigation.protected_routes: Working - redirects to login if not authenticated
